data.title: Carvana Announces 5-for-1 Stock Split to Lower Share Price
data.description: Carvana's board has approved a 5-for-1 stock split to reduce the automotive retailer's high share price. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this decision follows a significant multiyear rally from the pandemic's impact. The stock split aims to make shares more accessible to a broader range of investors, reflecting the company's strong performance and growth in recent years.

data.title: Solana Stablecoin Trading Volume Hits Record $650 Billion in February
data.description: Solana-based stablecoin trading volume reached an unprecedented $650 billion in February. According to NS3.AI, this surge was driven by heightened demand for on-chain payments. The increase highlights the growing interest in utilizing stablecoins for transactions within the Solana ecosystem, reflecting broader trends in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: UK Prime Minister Starmer Vows Government Intervention Against Fuel Companies Exploiting Customers
data.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced that his government will take action if fuel companies attempt to exploit customers. According to Jin10, Starmer emphasized the importance of protecting consumers from unfair practices in the energy sector. He stated that the government is prepared to intervene to ensure that fuel companies do not take advantage of customers, particularly during times of economic uncertainty. This announcement comes amid growing concerns about rising fuel prices and their impact on households. Starmer's commitment to consumer protection highlights the government's focus on addressing economic challenges and ensuring fair practices in the market.

data.title: 6.5 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Off Chile's Coast
data.description: A 6.5 magnitude earthquake occurred off the coast of Chile's Atacama region on March 13, according to the Euro-Mediterranean Seismological Center. The earthquake struck at 10:39 local time with a depth of 22 kilometers. According to Jin10, there have been no tsunami warnings issued at this time.

data.title: OPEC Increases Oil Production as Saudi Arabia Boosts Output
data.description: OPEC's crude oil production saw an increase last month, driven by Saudi Arabia's decision to enhance output amid escalating regional tensions. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the findings of a recent survey. The rise in production comes as geopolitical factors continue to influence the oil market dynamics.

data.title: UBS Asset Management Anticipates Market Overreaction to Interest Rate Hike Expectations
data.description:
UBS Asset Management is expressing caution regarding the market's current stance on anticipated interest rate hikes by the Bank of England and the European Central Bank. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting UBS AM's belief that investors may have overestimated the likelihood and impact of these potential monetary policy changes. The firm suggests that the market's aggressive positioning could lead to volatility if the central banks' actions do not align with expectations.

UBS AM's analysis comes amid ongoing discussions about inflation and economic recovery in Europe, with central banks weighing their options to manage these challenges. The firm advises investors to consider the broader economic context and potential risks associated with the current market sentiment.

As the Bank of England and the European Central Bank continue to assess their strategies, UBS AM remains vigilant, monitoring developments closely to adjust its investment approach accordingly. The firm emphasizes the importance of staying informed and adaptable in the face of evolving economic conditions.

data.title: STOCKS | Russell 2000 Index Rises Over 1%
data.description: The Russell 2000 Index, a key benchmark for small-cap stocks in the United States, experienced a significant increase of over 1%. According to Jin10, this rise reflects a positive shift in market sentiment, as investors show renewed interest in smaller companies. The upward movement in the index suggests a broader confidence in the economic outlook, despite ongoing uncertainties in the global market. Analysts are closely monitoring this trend to assess its potential impact on future investment strategies and market dynamics.

data.title: Crypto stocks opened higher across the board, with Circle rising 3.49%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, US stocks opened higher, with the three major indices rising: the Dow Jones Industrial Average up 0.47%, the S&P 500 up 0.5%, and the Nasdaq Composite up 0.49%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose, with Circle up 3.49%, COIN up 3.35%, DFDV up 8.09%, MSTR up 4.89%, and SBET up 5.48%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Market Opens Higher as Adobe CEO Resigns
data.description: The U.S. stock market opened with gains across its major indices. According to Jin10, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 0.47%, the S&P 500 increased by 0.5%, and the Nasdaq Composite climbed by 0.49%. In corporate news, Adobe experienced a significant drop of 7% following the announcement that its CEO, who has led the company for 18 years, will be stepping down.

data.title: Women Turn to Social Media to Monetize Unpaid Work
data.description: A growing number of women are leveraging social media platforms to earn from tasks traditionally unpaid, driven by dissatisfaction with corporate environments. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this trend among women who are redefining their roles and income sources outside conventional employment. These women, often referred to as 'breadmakers,' are finding new ways to capitalize on skills and activities that have historically been undervalued in the labor market. This shift reflects a broader movement towards alternative work models, as more individuals seek fulfillment and financial independence outside traditional corporate structures.

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Rises 3.7% as All Constituents Trade Higher
data.description: The CoinDesk 20 index experienced a 3.7% increase, reaching 2077.68 since 4 p.m. ET on Thursday. According to NS3.AI, all 20 constituents of the index traded higher during this period. Sui led the gains with a 6.7% rise, while Internet Computer recorded the smallest increase at 0.2%.

data.title: Middle East Tensions and Rising Oil Prices Impact Plastic Futures
data.description:
Recent developments in the Middle East and rising international oil prices have led to increased volatility in plastic futures. According to Jin10, the Dongguan Zhangmutou plastic market experienced significant congestion, sparking concerns about potential supply shortages and disruptions. However, investigations revealed that while there was temporary congestion around the Zhangmutou market, it did not amount to a supply interruption as speculated.

Xu Yina, Secretary-General of the Dongguan Plastics Industry Development Promotion Association, explained that the severe traffic congestion in early March was primarily due to sudden changes in market expectations, leading to concentrated pick-ups. This situation was exacerbated by continuous rainy weather, which temporarily increased the turnover pressure in local storage and logistics areas. She noted that since March 5, local logistics have fully resumed normal operations.

The supply of plastic raw materials in Dongguan and the Pearl River Delta is diverse, with sources from domestic, Southeast Asian, and Middle Eastern regions, excluding Iran. The proportion of Iranian supplies is relatively low, so the current geopolitical situation has not caused substantial disruptions to the local supply of plastic raw materials. Only a few specific brands have experienced minor disturbances, while the overall supply foundation remains stable.

data.title: Trend Research's associated address withdrew 27,000 ETH from Binance and deposited 150 million USDC.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the Trend Research-related address (0x25ff...beac) withdrew 27,000 ETH from Binance, subsequently repaid a loan from Aave, and deposited 150 million USDC. The address's ETH deposit price was $2063.72, and the withdrawal price was $2146.91. If a short selling operation had been performed, the address would have incurred a loss of $2.246 million.

data.title: In the past hour, nearly $100 million in liquidations have occurred across the entire network, with $40.96 million in liquidations occurring with Bitcoin alone.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, in the past hour, a total of $95.9816 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network, with $3.5756 million in long positions and $92.4061 million in short positions. Among them, $40.96 million in BTC positions were liquidated and $40.16 million in ETH positions were liquidated.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 73,000 USDT with a 3.96% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2026, 13:18 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 73,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 73,022.867188 USDT, with a narrowed 3.96% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Former CIA Officers Transition to Tech Startups
data.description: A growing number of former CIA officers are leaving the agency to establish and lead their own technology startups. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this emerging trend among ex-intelligence personnel. These individuals are leveraging their skills and experience gained from the CIA to innovate and drive advancements in the tech industry. This shift reflects a broader movement of intelligence professionals seeking new opportunities in the private sector, particularly in technology-driven fields.

data.title: Expert Predicts UK Interest Rates to Remain Unchanged Amid Energy Price Surge
data.description: MFS Investment Management's Peter Goves has indicated that despite the potential for energy price shocks to sustain high inflation, the Bank of England is unlikely to raise interest rates in the short term. According to Jin10, Goves noted that the rising unemployment rate continues to weaken the demand backdrop in the UK, while high energy costs may further suppress consumer spending. This situation reduces the likelihood of the Bank of England increasing rates to combat inflation.

data.title: STOCKS | Saudi Equities Rise Amid Gulf Conflict
data.description: Saudi stock markets have shown resilience, rising despite the ongoing conflict in the Gulf region. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the unexpected performance of Saudi equities as trading resumed. Contrary to initial predictions of a downturn due to the Iran war, Saudi stocks have managed to defy expectations and demonstrate growth. This development comes as investors closely monitor the geopolitical tensions and their potential impact on regional markets.

data.title: GateRouter is now available on Gate.com: It supports unified API calls to mainstream large-scale models, reducing costs by up to 80%.
data.description: Gate has officially launched GateRouter, its AI model routing platform, providing developers with a unified entry point for calling large models. Through a single API, users can access over 25 mainstream models, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, DeepSeek, Qwen, and Moonshot. The system intelligently matches the most suitable model based on task complexity, optimizing call costs while ensuring effectiveness. GateRouter adopts a compatible access method, allowing developers to complete integration in just 30 seconds with a single command. Developers can manage API keys, view call logs and usage statistics through the developer console, and use a built-in Playground for online model performance comparison. Official data shows that by automatically matching models through intelligent routing, the overall average AI inference cost can be reduced by over 80% compared to using only flagship models. Currently, GateRouter is open to AI Agent developers, enterprise teams, and Web3 Builders, with related services offered free for a limited time. In the future, the platform will adopt a pay-as-you-go model and support Gate Pay USDT balance deduction. It will also gradually integrate payment methods such as fiat currency, credit cards and x402 protocol to improve the AI ​​Agent's automated calling and settlement capabilities.

data.title: Bitget wins TokenInsight Awards 2025 "Comprehensive Exchange of the Year" award
data.description: TokenInsight awarded Bitget the "Universal Exchange of the Year" award in its annual rankings, recognizing its continuous innovation and comprehensive strength in the global crypto asset trading ecosystem. TokenInsight's selection process reportedly based on a comprehensive evaluation across multiple dimensions, including product portfolio, liquidity depth, user growth, and diversified asset trading capabilities. Bitget is gradually building a comprehensive trading platform covering spot trading, derivatives, asset management, on-chain ecosystem, and traditional financial asset trading such as stocks and CFDs, further demonstrating its "Universal Exchange" development direction.
